description:
This quiz tests a developer's mastery of JavaScript's notoriously complex native Date API, emphasizing manual formatting and localization over third-party libraries. Delivered with a humorous and slightly sarcastic tone, it presents an intermediate-to-advanced difficulty level aimed at reinforcing core language fundamentals.
Topics: JavaScript Date API, Date formatting, Localization, Native JavaScript methods
Audience: JavaScript developers and web programmers
